sessions.note: candidate.c floor confirmed at 4 (57/58 insns; gap = pathB's folded (s16)-1). Mechanism proof: target pathB li/sll/sra is an UNFOLDED s16 extension of -1 with shared sra join; cse folds it in any single-block spelling, so the byte-producing class REQUIRES a result-carrier assigned per-path and extended at a multi-pred join (s32 carrier measured 8 previously; s16 is the only class). needs-user/structured-if-else-tail.c (if/else + single trailing return, no goto/label) = sandbox 0, 58/58, 0 full-register diffs, retires all 7 rules. Cheat-reviewer verdict NEEDS_USER: same mechanism as the user-reverted lever 3 by another spelling; notes.md requires the s16-carrier form to go through the user-sanction path (or SOTN evidence). Parked per the NEEDS_USER-is-final hard rule.

reviewer.question_for_user: Does the 2026-06-10 revert decision extend to ALL spellings of the s16-carrier + shared-sext tail mechanism for saFidLoad (pending SOTN research), or does the structured if/else single-trailing-return form (no goto, no label) constitute a sufficiently natural single-exit C idiom to sanction without SOTN evidence? Mechanism proof says the carrier class is the ONLY spelling class that produces target's tail bytes (see needs-user/structured-if-else-tail.c header).

reviewer.in_session_verdict: PASS (lenient; superseded by the retroactive audit + user decision)

next_hypotheses: USER DECISION (blocking): sanction or reject needs-user/structured-if-else-tail.c. If sanctioned, apply it, retire (drops 7 rules), queue done, delete this WIP dir. Consider whether proven-spelling-class-reconstruction's 4-point criterion applies (mechanical proof present; natural single-exit C; most human-plausible representative of the proven class; last lever after candidate-floor measurement).

If the user wants evidence first: SOTN master-branch research for an s16-carrier + single-trailing-return sext tail (the notes' re-proposal path). The structured spelling may need LESS evidence than the goto-end spelling since single-exit result-variable style is idiomatic.

If the user rejects the family outright: the function cannot reach COMPLETED-C in pure C (mechanism proof says no other spelling class emits the tail) — it stays bridged with the 7 rules; revisit only if new mechanisms surface.
